tluaMultiReturnTypeSyntaxErrors.tlua(2,10): error TLUA2583: Cannot find name 'Map'. Do you need to change your target library? Try changing the 'lib' compiler option to 'es2015' or later.
tluaMultiReturnTypeSyntaxErrors.tlua(5,42): error TLUA1228: A type predicate is only allowed in return type position for functions and methods.
tluaMultiReturnTypeSyntaxErrors.tlua(5,42): error TLUA100021: A type predicate cannot be part of a multiple return type.
tluaMultiReturnTypeSyntaxErrors.tlua(23,22): error TLUA100033: Multiple return types must be parenthesized.
tluaMultiReturnTypeSyntaxErrors.tlua(26,33): error TLUA100033: Multiple return types must be parenthesized.
tluaMultiReturnTypeSyntaxErrors.tlua(27,29): error TLUA100033: Multiple return types must be parenthesized.


==== tluaMultiReturnTypeSyntaxErrors.tlua (6 errors) ====
    // Ordinary callable return types do not consume enclosing commas.
    type H = Map<() => number, string>;
             ~~~
!!! error TLUA2583: Cannot find name 'Map'. Do you need to change your target library? Try changing the 'lib' compiler option to 'es2015' or later.
    type ParenthesizedSingle = () => (string)[];
    type ConditionalSingle<T> = () => (T extends string ? number : boolean);
    type BadPredicate = (value: unknown) => (value is string, number);
                                             ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1228: A type predicate is only allowed in return type position for functions and methods.
                                             ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100021: A type predicate cannot be part of a multiple return type.
    
    function takesCallback(cb: () => number, more: string)
      return cb() + more.length;
    end
    
    function trailingCallback(cb: () => number,)
      return cb();
    end
    
    // An arrow return type in a call argument list does not swallow the comma.
    function twoArgs(a: (x: number) => number, b: number)
      return a(b);
    end
    local r = twoArgs(function(x): number return x end, 1);
    
    // A bare multiple return type must be parenthesized; the list is still
    // parsed for recovery, so the pack itself checks normally.
    function barePair(): number, string
                         ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100033: Multiple return types must be parenthesized.
      return 1, "a";
    end
    declare function bareAmbient(): number, ...string;
                                    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100033: Multiple return types must be parenthesized.
    local function bareLocal(): number, string?
                                ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100033: Multiple return types must be parenthesized.
      return 1, nil;
    end
    local a, b = barePair();
    local n: number = a;
    local s: string = b;
